name: PlayStation 4
description: Sony's 1080p home console platform, known for strong third-party support, digital services, and major cinematic first-party games.

eras.title: Foundation Era
eras.description: Early generation focused on cross-generation releases, digital services, and establishing PS4 as the default third-party platform.

eras.title: First-Party Peak Era
eras.description: Sony's cinematic first-party identity peaks alongside major third-party releases.

eras.title: Cross-Generation Era
eras.description: PS4 continues receiving major releases alongside PlayStation 5.
